name: camp_lake
_comment: #10: PP can walk out along the deck (walkSegments). Big blocker removed so the deck is reachable; the walk path keeps him on the planks. A 'Lake' look-hotspot (wired in game.go) gives the 'not in the mood to swim' line. Tune the deck Y in-game.
_comment_walk: 2026-06-24 #4: first segment (375,466→613,433) reads correct; raised the FAR end of the second segment a little higher (393→374) so the dots keep tracking the planks as the dock recedes. CENTER lines (foot = y+135). F3-verify against the boat end.
